reviews.review_title: Brilliant Puzzle Fun with Retropy Pro
reviews.review_description:
This is an absolute gem for puzzle game enthusiasts! From the moment I started, I was hooked by the clever and creative challenges that kept me thoroughly engaged. Each item is deconstructed and crafted for you to construct in an easy manageable format.
The gameplay is smooth and intuitive, with a beautifully designed interface that’s easy to navigate. The puzzles range in difficulty, offering the perfect balance between brain-teasing fun and rewarding satisfaction. After you have rebuilt the puzzle I would love to see it animate in some way although that said it is still rewarding to hold rotate and look at the finished puzzle at all angles.
Overall, Retropy Pro is a must-play for any puzzle lover. It’s addictive, smartly designed, and endlessly entertaining. I can't recommend it enough and I know the devs are very active with this game so I look forward to where they will take it.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your incredible review! As a small indie team of just three people, every positive review like yours energizes us and motivates us to keep improving. We’re thrilled to hear that you’re enjoying the puzzles and smooth gameplay—we put a lot of love into crafting Retropy Pro to make it both engaging and rewarding.

As promised, we’ll be updating the game with 1–2 new free puzzles every month, created from 3D scans shared by our amazing community. We’d love to hear your thoughts on the new puzzles and suggestions for objects you’d like us to scan. Your feedback truly helps shape the future of Retropy Pro. Thank you for being part of our journey!

reviews.review_description: It relaxing and I can’t wait for new features!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind review! 😊 We’re thrilled to hear that Retropy Pro has become your go-to for some fun and relaxation. Great news: we’ve got 1-2 free 3D puzzle updates coming soon, featuring awesome new puzzles created from real user-scanned models! Stay tuned, and we can’t wait to share these with you!

reviews.review_description:
A new rival to Puzzling Places has finally arrived, great work by the team, working so hard over the last few months to get this where it is today.

The puzzles are an enjoyable mix of retro subjects, it’s nice to sit on the sofa and puzzle and chill.

With all the FPS it’s so nice to have another puzzle alternative.
Add it to your collection.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your wonderful review! We're thrilled you’re enjoying Retropy Pro as a relaxing and unique puzzling experience. As promised, we’ll be updating the game with 1–2 new free puzzles every month—be sure to try them out and share your feedback with us!

All puzzles are created from 3D scans submitted by other players, so let us know your favorite objects, and we’ll work on scanning more of them for you. Your input helps shape the future of Retropy—happy puzzling!

reviews.review_description:
The puzzles are fun and challenging. There are quite a few to choose from. The controls were pretty responsive as well.

I had a couple times where I was racing the clock to complete a puzzle quickly and the pieces locked together in a strange way where they didn't line up, nor did they fix themselves as other pieces started locking in. At the end, I had quite a Frankenstein's monster. The only puzzle I remember this happening vividly on was the stack of S. King books.

I highly recommend this puzzle game!
In a world of shooters and zombie games, it’s nice to escape into a puzzle universe that still has a lot of opportunity to grow. I can’t wait to see even more puzzles!
